eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 5:17 AM on JUL 12, 2026 Effective until 1:17 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A SAFE Alert has been issued for Gilbert, Arizona. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Gilbert Police Department is looking for Susano Hernandez. He is described as a 71-year-old Hispanic male, five foot six inches, 187 pounds, gray hair and brown eyes. Susano was last seen on 07/11/2026 at 10 pm in the area of Cooper and Ray Roads in Gilbert. Susano is believed to be wearing a blue shirt and blue shorts. Susano suffers from a medical condition and may become disoriented or easily confused.  

If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
